evals.prompt: I just created a new skill in Plugins/gaudi/src-gaudi/skills/telemetry-testing/SKILL.md. Can you make sure the gaudi.zip file is updated to include this new skill? Verify it worked.
evals.expected_output: gaudi.zip is regenerated and includes the telemetry-testing skill; verification confirms plugin.json parses and the skill file is in the zip

evals.prompt: What plugins in my workspace need repackaging right now? Check if any source folders are newer than their corresponding .zip files.
evals.expected_output: List of plugins with timestamp comparison showing which ones have stale zips; recommendation to repackage if any are out of sync

evals.prompt: I've been editing multiple plugin source files across gaudi, the-one-ring, and magneto. Can you repackage all of them and show me which ones were updated?
evals.expected_output: All three plugins repackaged; log showing timestamp, file count, and verification status for each; clear indication of what changed in each zip
